title: Luxury Penthouse with Skyline Views
description: Experience premium urban living in this stunning penthouse located in the heart of downtown. Features floor-to-ceiling windows, high-end marble finishes, a spacious private terrace overlooking the city, and smart home systems. Access to resident lounge, indoor heated pool, and full-time concierge services included.

title: Modern Minimalist Villa in Tech Corridor
description: A gorgeous contemporary villa surrounded by lush greenery. Designed for peace and productivity, this villa features an open-plan layout, minimalist architectural lines, a dedicated home office setup with high-speed fiber connectivity, and double-glazed windows for absolute quiet.

title: Chic Cozy Studio near Central Station
description: Perfect for young professionals or students, this compact but beautifully optimized studio offers micro-luxury. Rent includes high-speed fiber internet. Features built-in wardrobe, hideaway bed, induction stove, laundry washer-dryer combo, and soundproof windows.

title: Suburban Family House with Backyard
description: Charming colonial-style family home situated in a top-rated school district. Features a huge fenced backyard with a patio, a detached two-car garage, a cozy fireplace in the living room, and a newly renovated modern kitchen.

title: Luxury Glass-front Condominium
description: Stunning corner-unit condo in a high-rise waterfront building. Features state-of-the-art integrated Miele appliances, quartz countertops, a walk-in wardrobe, and floor-to-ceiling glass walls offering unobstructed harbor views.

title: Traditional Heritage Villa
description: Exquisite heritage estate capturing vintage royalty. Featuring high timber ceilings, hand-painted tiles, private courtyard garden, antique furniture, and standard modern upgrades like automated central cooling and premium security.
